name: Calico Kitty Cookies
recipeIngredient: Pkg Pillsbury Refrigerated Choc. Chip Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Place cookie dough in freezer for at least 1 hour.
2. Preheat oven to 350°F. Cut the cookie dough into 24 slices and place them 3 inches apart on an ungreased cookie sheet. For the ears, press two pecan halves onto the top of each cookie, overlapping the edge of the cookie. For the eyes and nose, press in M&Ms. For whiskers, place two pretzel pieces on each side of the nose and press them in slightly.
3. Bake for 11 to 13 minutes or until light golden brown. Allow cooling for one minute before removing from the cookie sheets.
